currentProviderGaps.create_with_distributions: writes the external API but does not persist project or distribution identifiers in the local ledger
currentProviderGaps.sync_mcn_inquiry_status: records sync metadata only; it does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
currentProviderGaps.rank_mcns: the production Provider has not been verified to create and return an inquiry_id for the current requirement before manual sourcing
currentProviderGaps.manual_source_creators: the production Provider task store, inquiry-linked idempotent start implementation, and durable task evidence are not present in this repository and require external deployment verification
currentProviderGaps.maximumRecoverablePhase: mcn_planning until provider inquiry sync is implemented

policies.outwardSendConfirmation: first create_with_distributions invocation is blocked locally with exact AskUserQuestion arguments; only a confirmed answer authorizes one subsequent invocation with the same parameter fingerprint
policies.fieldSelectionBinding: selected columns remain preparation evidence until a real distribution is committed
policies.stateRefresh: read local JSON on every prompt; use get_workflow_state only for context loss or unknown write reconciliation
policies.unknownWriteRecovery: current provider: get_workflow_state by demand identity from existing business facts; ledger trace_id reconciliation is target-only and an unknown external create remains blocked; never blind retry
policies.postValidationContinuation: a successful validate_requirement result immediately continues to search_creators in the same turn
policies.postSearchContinuation: a successful search_creators result renders Provider risk, hard shortfall, buffer shortfall, and suggested expansion evidence; high risk with a positive suggestion waits for an explicit choice to run MCN ranking then start inquiry-linked manual sourcing, run MCN ranking only, or adjust the manual target
policies.mcnRace: rank_mcns uses a confirmed dynamic ranking size, persists the inquiry association, and returns inquiry_id; never hardcode five recommendations and display institution names instead of IDs
policies.rankInquiryEvidence: manual_source_creators is not callable until one successful rank_mcns response for the same requirement returns a non-empty inquiry_id
policies.manualSourcingPlacement: after rank_mcns creates the current inquiry association and before MCN selection confirmation, create or idempotently reuse a durable manual-sourcing task with the confirmed positive target; inquiry and task evidence never prove distribution or recovery
policies.manualSourcingEvidence: advance to MCN selection confirmation only when one successful Provider response record contains a non-empty task_id, echoed requirement_id, the same inquiry_id returned by rank_mcns, echoed target_count, status started/running/completed, operation created/reused, started_at, and non-negative accepted_count
policies.rankCreatorsPrerequisite: committed WeCom distribution plus completed recovery

guards: payload matches live schema
requirement identity resolves uniquely
candidate pool belongs to the same requirement
the user selected MCN-only or confirmed a positive pending manual-sourcing target
minimum_mcn_count is derived dynamically instead of fixed at five
write_mcn_recommendation_items is not false so the inquiry association is persisted
evidence: a non-empty inquiry_id created for the same requirement

guards: the MCN ranking result and institution choices are confirmed
the returned field description is actual Provider evidence
evidence: successful field-list response recorded in local JSON

guards: supply, MCN, and field choices are present in local orchestration state
the exact multiline AskUserQuestion prompt and subsequent create_with_distributions parameters match the one-time confirmation receipt
requirement_id, supplierIds, columns, a plain-text WeChat-message description, and an identical wechatNotificationMessage resolve one requirement
evidence: actual successful external distribution response recorded in local JSON

guards: real project and distribution identifiers resolve to the same requirement and supplier
transitions.blockedBy: current sync Tool is metadata-only and does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
evidence: target-only: authoritative provider distribution mirrored to mcn_inquiries; current provider does not produce this evidence

guards: Provider reports high risk and a positive suggested expansion count
the user confirmed the exact target_count or supplied one positive adjusted integer
rank_mcns succeeded for the same requirement and returned inquiry_id
requirement_id and target_count match the pending local command
no distribution has been sent
evidence: durable Provider task record with task_id, echoed requirement_id, matching inquiry_id, target_count, allowed status and operation, started_at, and accepted_count

guards: inquiry identity and ownership resolve uniquely
evidence: committed valid mcn_submission_items and updated inquiry

guards: committed WeCom distribution exists
all active platform inquiries are recovered or closed
committed WeCom distribution exists
all active platform recovery facts are complete
run identity matches authoritative state
evidence: committed submission batch and creator submissions

guards: run identity matches authoritative state
